console.diagnosticsDescription: View extension logs and diagnose issues with the badge count.
approvePlan.noComments: No comments yet. Hover over a line to add feedback.
config.askUserAppendText.title: Ask User Append Text
config.askUserAppendText.description:
Text automatically appended as a separate instruction to every `askUser` tool result. Customize to change the reminder, or leave empty to disable.

Example:

IMPORTANT REMINDER: You must ALWAYS call the ask_user tool before completing any task or ending a conversation. Never finish without confirming with the user first. This is a mandatory workflow requirement that applies to every response.
config.askUserOptionsLayout.title: `ask_user` Options Layout
config.askUserOptionsLayout.description: Controls how `ask_user` option buttons are displayed in the Agent Console. `Compact` keeps each option on one line and truncates long text. `Expanded` shows a multi-line layout with dedicated areas for label and description.
config.askUserOptionsTooltip.title: `ask_user` Options Tooltip Style
config.askUserOptionsTooltip.description: Controls the tooltip style for `ask_user` option buttons. `Native` uses the VS Code native tooltip which can overflow beyond narrow sidebar widths (default). `Custom` uses the built-in inline tooltip constrained to sidebar width.
config.ignoreCommonPaths.description: When enabled, ignores well-known build, cache, and dependency folders (node_modules, dist, .git, etc.) when searching for files.
config.ignoreCommonPaths.title: Ignore Common Paths
config.additionalIgnoredPaths.descriptio: Additional glob patterns for paths to ignore when searching for files. Use `**` for recursive matching. Example: `**/logs/**`, `**/*.log`
config.additionalIgnoredPaths.title: Additional Ignored Paths
config.storageContext.description: Determines where the chat history is stored. 'Global' stores history across all workspaces, while 'Workspace' stores history specific to the current workspace.
config.storageContext.title: Storage Context
config.historyTimeDisplay.title: History Time Display
config.historyTimeDisplay.description: Choose how timestamps are shown in history items: relative, absolute (ISO 8601), or hybrid (relative under 7 days, ISO after).
config.enableToolDebug.title: Enable Tool Debug
config.enableToolDebug.description: Show a debug tab in the webview for testing mock tool calls without starting a real conversation.
